name: azure-iac-guardrail
description: Review Azure Terraform security, compliance, architecture risk, and plan changes directly inside VS Code.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Azure IaC Guardrail
walkthroughs.description: Review Terraform security, resolved plan values, architecture risk, and audit evidence without leaving VS Code.

steps.title: Open a Terraform workspace
steps.description: Open the Terraform root module that contains the `.tf` files you want to review.

steps.title: Run a fast static scan
steps.description: Run [Azure IaC Guardrail: Scan Terraform Files](command:infraCompliance.scanWorkspace) for offline feedback using variable defaults, automatic tfvars, selected variable files, and supported locals.

steps.title: Configure local Azure standards
steps.description: Run [Azure IaC Guardrail: Azure Pre-configuration](command:infraCompliance.configureWorkspace) to choose the generated Terraform version constraint and define regions, tags, cost assumptions, exceptions, and exclusions.

steps.title: Scan resolved Terraform values
steps.description: Run [Azure IaC Guardrail: Create and Scan Local Terraform Plan](command:infraCompliance.createAndScanPlan) and select the intended tfvars file to evaluate resolved values, modules, and relationships.

steps.title: Use a plan from another workflow
steps.description: Run [Azure IaC Guardrail: Scan Existing Terraform Plan](command:infraCompliance.scanPlan) to review a binary `.tfplan` or `terraform show -json` output from another workflow.

steps.title: Sketch Azure infrastructure
steps.description: Run [Azure IaC Guardrail: Cloud Canvas](command:sketchyourinfra) to drag Azure service cards onto a canvas, connect them, and preview generated Terraform.

steps.title: Explore a Terraform plan
steps.description: Run [Azure IaC Guardrail: Open Terraform Plan Architecture](command:infraCompliance.visualizePlan) to search and filter a plan-derived dependency canvas.

commands.title: Azure IaC Guardrail: Scan Terraform Files
Azure IaC Guardrail: Initialize Modules and Scan Terraform Files
Azure IaC Guardrail: Scan Existing Terraform Plan
Azure IaC Guardrail: Create and Scan Local Terraform Plan
Azure IaC Guardrail: Open Terraform Plan Architecture
Azure IaC Guardrail: Compare Two Terraform Plans
Azure IaC Guardrail: Select Static Scan Variable Files
Azure IaC Guardrail: Export Scan Results as PDF
Azure IaC Guardrail: Export Auditor Evidence Pack
Azure IaC Guardrail: Analyze PR Change and Blast Radius

azureIacGuardrail.scanOnSave.description: Scan Terraform files against Azure controls when they are saved.

azureIacGuardrail.workspaceControlsPath.description: Workspace-relative folder containing additional JSON control files.

azureIacGuardrail.terraformPath.description: Terraform executable path used to create plans and convert binary plans to JSON.

azureIacGuardrail.initializeBeforePlan.description: Run terraform init in non-interactive mode before creating a local compliance plan. Disable when initialization is managed separately.

azureIacGuardrail.retainGeneratedPlan.description: Keep the generated binary plan at .azure-iac-guardrail/plans/latest.tfplan after scanning. Plan files can contain sensitive values.

azureIacGuardrail.staticVarFiles.description: Workspace-relative tfvars files loaded by offline static scans after Terraform automatic variable files.

scripts.package: npm run catalog:validate && npm run check:terraform-identifiers && npm run check && npm run test && npm run compile && vsce package
